hooks.prompt: You MUST respond with ONLY a JSON object, no other text. Read docs/features.md, then check if the code changes in this session added, changed, or removed any user-facing feature, shortcut, or behavior not reflected in docs/features.md. Approve bug fixes, refactoring, internal changes, and test changes. When in doubt, block. Respond ONLY with either {"ok": true} or {"ok": false, "reason": "short description of what to update"}.
